reviews.review_title: Servers are now up and works on s7
reviews.review_description: Works now to download the movie.  Nice concept that allows you to watch from every angles.  It would have been great if it would have been shot in 3d.  The movie itself is pretty low budget (no special effects) and the acting is so so..  i still give it 4 stars for the concept and how this could be a way to shoot professional films in the future.
I can't even find it on my headset.

I likw the concept of use controlling the video by focusing on things. I kept looking at the paintings which kept multiplying. Other than that not scary, the guy in blue did horrible acting AMD a missed opportunity. But again interesting concept.

If I could give it zero stars I would; do not waste your time. I'm not sure which is worse, the acting or the dialog. Video quality is low res and buggy; frames freeze while playback continues. The plot is dull and anticlimactic; nothing even close to frightening, much less entertaining.

A truly novel experience, so it finished downloading after I got in the last time and it said it needed to download the last 20mb and I finished it. It has a passive mode which progresses the story based on where your attention is drawn by visual orientation and one where you can control it with the touch pad and though not a terrifying experience it was certainly creepy.
This is a nice idea, and it's free so it's worth looking at. But it's dull, simple and boring.
Crap
Dont work
Having multiple camera locations to view the action from different angles is quite interesting as it allows the viewer to move around within the scenes adding an extra dimension to the film.
It doesn't work
So poor quality (as many other movies in VR)... Can't stand more than 2min... Pity. I liked the concept of multiole angles camera tho.
It won't even load cause it has to download something even though I installed it and no matter how long I wait it doesn't work or download whatever it is talking about.
Not great, short and looks a bit amateur
Video quality could be way better. Acting is fine. Not particularly scary but its cool how you can view from wherever you want to go. I think this is how movies should be made for vr
Plot and picture quality is not good..although it's fun to watch from various room angles..it wud be good if they've shown the ghost
By Pseudoscience. Virtual multi-angle video. TRT 5 min.
Won't load.  Connecting to server....video is installed but absolutely won't play.

I didnt see anything worth seeing. Maybe the use of a gamepad would have made this better since I could t keep up with all the twisting and turning while moving. The story seemed ok but I feel like I missed a lot having to run after them.

Everyone is saying this doesn't work.  1st - it will go to a black screen for 10-20 seconds.  Then it makes you download large video files.  2nd - After downloading the video files and starting the app again, it will go to a black screen again.  Eventually the thing loads.  Too bad, when it does load, the video quality is bad, the acting isn't great and it is not scary at all.  Worked on an s6 updated to marshmallow os.  The devs should put a loading bar during the black screen to prevent confusion.  Nice attempt at a new story telling medium, just wasn't very entertaining.  Would give 2.5 if i could.
it does not work!! i have been trying to open this app for the last hour. no success!
